name: Xi Jinping
role: General Secretary, CCP; President of China — directs tech self-reliance strategy
quote: Technology is the primary productive force. We must adhere to innovation-driven development, seize the commanding heights of technology, and strive to overcome key core technology chokepoints.

name: Ren Zhengfei
role: Founder & CEO, Huawei — built China's most sanctioned but resilient tech company
quote: The United States has underestimated us. The pressure the US has put on us will only make us stronger. Cutting off our supply chain of semiconductors will backfire.

name: Meng Wanzhou
role: CFO, Huawei (Deputy Chair 2023–); Ren Zhengfei's daughter — center of US-China diplomatic crisis
quote: As a Huawei employee, I am proud to stand here. If I was in Huawei, it means I stand for something. The world has seen Huawei's resilience and determination to survive.

name: Zhang Yiming
role: Founder, ByteDance ($550B valuation, Mar 2026) — resigned as CEO 2021; TikTok US divestiture deal finalized Jan 2026
quote: I am not a social person. The most important thing I can contribute as ByteDance's co-founder is to ensure we have the right people to do the right things.

name: Liang Wenfeng
role: Founder & CEO, DeepSeek — quant hedge fund manager who created world-class AI lab
quote: We believe full-scale open source is the right approach. It allows the global AI community to build on our work and ensures that the benefits of AI research are shared widely.

name: Robin Li (Li Yanhong)
role: Co-founder & CEO, Baidu — China's leading search and AI company, ERNIE Bot creator
quote: AI is the key to the next generation of the internet. China will lead in AI applications even if we face challenges in hardware. The ERNIE Bot represents China's capability to compete at the frontier.

name: Jack Ma (Ma Yun)
role: Founder, Alibaba Group — symbol of China's tech crackdown after 2020 speech criticizing regulators
quote: Today's Alibaba is not my Alibaba anymore. Good entrepreneurs must be willing to give up control at the right time. I want to see Alibaba's technology serve the common people.

name: Wang Chuanfu
role: Founder & CEO, BYD — leads China's dominance in global EV manufacturing
quote: Our biggest competitor is not Tesla. Our biggest competitor is China's own internal combustion engine manufacturers that we must replace. After that, we will compete globally.

name: Gina Raimondo
role: US Secretary of Commerce (2021–2025) — architect of sweeping chip export controls against China
quote: We will not allow China to use American technology against America and our allies. When national security is at stake, we will act — even if it costs US companies revenue in the short term.

name: Jake Sullivan
role: National Security Advisor (2021–2025) — designed 'small yard, high fence' tech containment strategy
quote: For a set of specific technologies with clear military and intelligence applications, we want to maintain as large a lead as possible. We are not trying to hold all of China's technology back.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President (2017–21, 2025–) — launched trade war; initiated Huawei sanctions; oversaw TikTok deal negotiations
quote: China has been taking advantage of the United States for many years. We're going to charge them 100% tariffs on pharmaceuticals, on chips, on cars — whatever it takes to bring manufacturing back home. We want the pills made in America, the chips made in America.

name: Joe Biden
role: US President (2021–2025) — expanded chip controls, signed CHIPS Act, passed TikTok ban
quote: America invented the semiconductor. Let's make sure the future of semiconductors is made in America. We will invest in American manufacturing, American innovation, and American workers.

name: Jensen Huang
role: CEO, Nvidia — leads company caught between US export controls and China's $17B annual revenue
quote: China is a significant market for us. The export controls have been a headwind. But we believe that AI is so important to America's national security that if restricting exports is what it takes, we support the policy.

name: C.C. Wei (Wei Zhe'an)
role: CEO, TSMC — stewards the world's most strategically critical semiconductor fabs
quote: TSMC is not just a Taiwanese company. We are a global company that serves global customers. But we comply fully with export control regulations and will not ship to restricted parties.

name: Morris Chang
role: Founder, TSMC (Chairman Emeritus) — created the foundry model that made Taiwan a semiconductor superpower
quote: Globalization is almost dead and free trade is almost dead. A lot of people still wish they would come back, but I don't think they will be back. The world will be a much more expensive place going forward.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
role: President, European Commission — leads EU's 'de-risking' strategy from China tech dependence
quote: We want to de-risk, not de-couple, from China. The relationship is one of the most complex we face — simultaneously a partner for cooperation on global challenges, an economic competitor, and a systemic rival.

name: Peter Wennink
role: Former CEO, ASML (retired 2024) — led company whose EUV monopoly is central chokepoint in US-China chip war
quote: The Chinese market is incredibly important to ASML. But we operate in a world where governments make geopolitical decisions and we must comply. We support export controls for national security, but overly broad restrictions will damage European industry.

name: Liu He
role: Vice Premier, China (2018–2023) — chief US-China trade negotiator for Phase 1 deal and semiconductor talks
quote: Trade wars have no winners. Both China and the United States need each other, and the global economy needs both of us to cooperate. We can manage differences and find common ground.

name: Alan Estevez
role: US Under Secretary of Commerce for Industry and Security (2022–2025) — implemented October 2022 chip controls
quote: These controls are aimed at preventing China from using US technologies for military modernization, mass destruction weapons, and human rights abuses. We are targeting specific technologies while trying to minimize collateral damage to commercial trade.

name: Sam Altman
role: CEO, OpenAI — leads US AI frontier; sought US chip restrictions on rivals including DeepSeek
quote: I think DeepSeek's success is a reminder that we cannot take American AI leadership for granted. It motivates me and our team to work harder. The global AI race is very real and we need strong US policy support.
